title: Orange Town Fights Back
description: On pages 25–27, this part develops the danger of Buggy’s crew and the unstable alliance between Luffy, Zoro, and Nami.
scene: Orange Town becomes the stage for Nami’s schemes, Buggy’s violence, and Luffy’s refusal to act like a normal pirate.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: OOF!

dialogue.speaker: Buggy
dialogue.text: CAPTAIN BUGGY! I'VE CAPTURED THE THE THE THE THE THE THE THE THE THE THE THE THE THE THE THE THE THE THE THE THE THE THE THE THE THE THE THE THE THE THE THE THE THE THE THE THE THE THE THE THE THE THE THE THE THE THE THE THE THE

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: And here's your map!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Hey! You tricked me!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Hmm... you're returning the map?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: WHAT'S ALL THIS ABOUT?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I HAD A DISPUTE WITH MY EMPLOYER!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: He's an idiot, so I thought I'd join up with you!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Huh?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: IDIOT, EH? You've got spunk! I think I will let you join my crew!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: INFITRATION ACCOMPLISHED! NOW TO GRAB BUGGY'S TREASURE AND THE MAP OF THE GRAND LINE...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: ...AND MAKE A QUICK GETAWAY!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: JUST FORGET ABOUT JOINING MY CREW, NOW!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: This is it, Master Zolo.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: IT LOOKS LIKE A GHOST TOWN.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Where is everyone?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Well you see, sir... we've taken over the town.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: WHAT'LL WE TELL CAPTAIN BUGGY?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: WE'RE COMING BACK EMPTY- HANDED...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: WE'LL JUST HAVE TO TELL HIM THE TRUTH. IT'S ALL THAT GIRL'S FAULT!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: C'mon. Take me to your captain.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Maybe he knows where Luffy is.

summary: The Orange Town conflict mixes Nami’s suspicious cleverness with Buggy’s theatrical cruelty. The section builds the unstable alliance that will oppose Buggy’s crew.
